message:
test(views): gate Graph/DiGraph NodeView mapping protocol (franken_networkx-yxpi)

Graph.nodes and DiGraph.nodes satisfy the ordinary NodeView mapping
contract — dict(G.nodes) yields {node: attrs} (no longer raising
ValueError about sequence-element length). Add a parametrized parity
gate covering dict() equality, keys/items/values, and get() on hit/miss
against upstream NetworkX for both simple-graph families, mirroring
the Multi* sibling already locked by test_multigraph_nodes_satisfies_mapping_protocol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -658,6 +658,37 @@ def test_multigraph_adj_satisfies_mapping_protocol(fnx_ctor, nx_ctor):
     assert fg.adj.get("missing") is ng.adj.get("missing") is None
 
 
+@pytest.mark.parametrize(
+    ("fnx_ctor", "nx_ctor"),
+    [
+        (fnx.Graph, nx.Graph),
+        (fnx.DiGraph, nx.DiGraph),
+    ],
+)
+def test_simple_graph_nodes_satisfies_mapping_protocol(fnx_ctor, nx_ctor):
+    """Bead franken_networkx-yxpi: Graph.nodes / DiGraph.nodes must
+    satisfy the ordinary NodeView mapping contract — dict(G.nodes) must
+    yield {node: attrs}, not raise ValueError("dictionary update
+    sequence element #0 has length 1; 2 is required").
+    """
+    fg = fnx_ctor()
+    fg.add_node("a", color="red")
+    fg.add_node("b")
+    ng = nx_ctor()
+    ng.add_node("a", color="red")
+    ng.add_node("b")
+
+    for attr in ("items", "keys", "values", "get"):
+        assert hasattr(fg.nodes, attr)
+
+    assert dict(fg.nodes) == dict(ng.nodes)
+    assert list(fg.nodes.keys()) == list(ng.nodes.keys())
+    assert list(fg.nodes.items()) == list(ng.nodes.items())
+    assert list(fg.nodes.values()) == list(ng.nodes.values())
+    assert fg.nodes.get("a") == ng.nodes.get("a")
+    assert fg.nodes.get("missing") is ng.nodes.get("missing") is None
+
+
 @pytest.mark.parametrize(
     ("fnx_ctor", "nx_ctor"),
     [
